---
id: mesh-resource-usage-report-put
title: "Import Resource Usage Report"
description: "Use this endpoint to provide cost data from external systems to meshStack. A meshResourceUsageReport will be picked up by the billing system of meshStack and subsequently included into regular meshTenantUsageReports."
sidebar_label: "Import Resource Usage Report"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "put api-method"
info_path: metering-api/meshmetering-api-documentation
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Import Resource Usage Report"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/api/meshobjects/meshresourceusagereports/{platformTenantId}/{period}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Use this endpoint to provide cost data from external systems to meshStack. A meshResourceUsageReport will be picked up by the billing system of meshStack and subsequently included into regular meshTenantUsageReports.

**Authentication:** This endpoint supports API User authentication.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"platformTenantId","in":"path","description":"The Platform Tenant ID of the tenant causing the costs.","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}},{"name":"period","in":"path","description":"The month during which the costs have occurred, e.g. 2023-05-01Z for May 2023.","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}},{"name":"Content-Type","in":"header","description":"meshObject Import is <<versioning,versioned>> and `application/vnd.meshcloud.api.meshobjects.v1+yaml` or `application/vnd.meshcloud.api.meshobjects.v1+json` can be used as a `Content-Type`.","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"},"example":"application/vnd.meshcloud.api.meshobjects.v1+json;charset=UTF-8"},{"name":"Accept","in":"header","description":"meshApi is <<versioning,versioned>> and you should use  `application/vnd.meshcloud.api.meshobjects.v1+json` as an `Accept` header to be guaranteed the V1 response format of this endpoint. New versions will be added in future.","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"},"example":"application/vnd.meshcloud.api.meshobjects.v1+json"}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/vnd.meshcloud.api.meshobjects.v1+json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"required":["apiVersion","fullPlatformIdentifier","kind","source"],"type":"object","properties":{"lineItems":{"type":"array","items":{"required":["currency","productName","sellerId","sellerProductGroup","totalCost","usageCost","usageQuantity","usageType","usageUnit"],"type":"object","properties":{"usageUnit":{"type":"string","description":"The unit of the given usageQuantity, for example, h for hours or d for days."},"usageCost":{"type":"number","description":"The cost per consumed usageUnit. usageQuantity multiplied by usageCost should always equal totalCost."},"sellerId":{"type":"string","description":"Optional. An identifier of the seller who provides the services and is the recipient of the payment. E.g. the name of a cloud provider, or for internal costs the name of a department."},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"The ISO-4217 compliant currency code, e.g. EUR or USD."},"usageQuantity":{"type":"number","description":"The usage quantity, for example, 48 if a product was used for 48 hours."},"sellerProductGroup":{"type":"string","description":"Optional. A sub-category of the seller if more fine-grained assignment is needed. E.g. different payment methods the seller has for the services it provides in a platform."},"totalCost":{"type":"number","description":"totalCost equals usageQuantity multiplied by usageCost."},"productName":{"type":"string","description":"Name of the product."},"usageType":{"type":"string","description":"To elaborate on the usageUnit, this field is used to describe what exactly is consumed and billed, for example, 'hours of CPU/RAM usage'."}}}},"apiVersion":{"type":"string","description":"Required for backwards compatibility. v1 is the only supported version at the moment."},"fullPlatformIdentifier":{"type":"string","description":"An identifier in the format $platformInstance.$location, where $platformInstance refers to the identifier of the meshPlatform, and $location refers to the identifier of the meshLocation."},"kind":{"type":"string","description":"Always set this to meshResourceUsageReport."},"source":{"type":"string","description":"Name of the system where this ResourceUsageReport originates from."}},"title":"api-meshobjects-meshresourceusagereports-platformTenantId-period655846858"},"examples":{"meshResourceUsageReportPut":{"value":"{\n    \"apiVersion\": \"v1\",\n    \"kind\": \"meshResourceUsageReport\",\n    \"fullPlatformIdentifier\": \"my-platform-instance.my-location\",\n    \"source\": \"Name of Source System\",\n    \"lineItems\": [\n        {\n            \"productName\": \"Virtual Machine\",\n            \"sellerId\": \"CloudHaven Inc.\",\n            \"sellerProductGroup\": \"Compute\",\n            \"usageQuantity\": 48,\n            \"usageType\": \"Hours of CPU/RAM usage\",\n            \"usageCost\": 1.2,\n            \"currency\": \"USD\",\n            \"usageUnit\": \"h\",\n            \"totalCost\": 57.6\n        },\n        {\n            \"productName\": \"SSD storage\",\n            \"sellerId\": \"CloudHaven Inc.\",\n            \"sellerProductGroup\": \"Storage\",\n            \"usageQuantity\": 480,\n            \"usageType\": \"Hours of usage multiplied by amounts of GB\",\n            \"usageCost\": 0.05,\n            \"currency\": \"USD\",\n            \"usageUnit\": \"h\",\n            \"totalCost\": 24\n        }\n    ]\n}"}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"200","content":{"application/vnd.meshcloud.api.meshobjects.v1+json":{"schema":{"title":"meshResourceUsageReportPut","required":["meshObject","status"],"type":"object","properties":{"meshObject":{"type":"string","description":"The name of the meshObject (this is always set to meshResourceUsageReport)"},"resultCode":{"type":"string","description":"Specific result code for this import result.\n\nIf no error has occurred, it's set to null. Otherwise, it's set to, SERVER_ERROR, as this is is the only possible error code at the moment.","nullable":true},"message":{"type":"string","description":"A user readable message with more details. (might be null)","nullable":true},"remarks":{"type":"array","description":"User readable remarks on this import result. (might be null)","nullable":true,"items":{"oneOf":[{"type":"object"},{"type":"boolean"},{"type":"string"},{"type":"number"}]}},"status":{"type":"string","description":"The import result status for this meshResourceUsageReport. (SUCCESS or FAILED)"}}},"examples":{"meshResourceUsageReportPut":{"value":"{\n  \"meshObject\" : \"meshResourceUsageReport\",\n  \"status\" : \"SUCCESS\",\n  \"resultCode\" : null,\n  \"message\" : null,\n  \"remarks\" : null\n}"}}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
